title: Application for Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP) - Canada.ca
content:
## Application for Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP)
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
Use this application to apply for coverage under the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP). Before you apply, find out if you are eligible .
You can apply online or on paper.
- Submit an online application by creating an account .
- Under the heading “what would you like to do today”, select “apply for the Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP)”.
- Read the Instruction Guide [IMM 5568] for tips on how to fill out your application.
- Read the Instruction Guide [IMM 5568] .
- Download and fill out the application form: Application for IFHP Coverage — [IMM 5564] ( PDF , 1.5 MB ) February 2019
- Mail your completed application to the nearest Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada office that processes this type of application.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
